references.passiveText: The regulars say the walls of this tavern have heard more confessions than any temple.
references.triggerDialogue: People drink, they talk. I've heard things that would curl your hair. {target_npc} once sat right where you're sitting and let slip something about a deal that went wrong near {location}. At the time I thought it was just guilt talking. Now I wonder if it was something more: the kind of truth that only comes out when someone forgets they're being listened to.

references.passiveText: There's a clerk in {location} who keeps meticulous records of every transaction. Obsessively meticulous.
references.triggerDialogue: {target_npc} has been documenting settlement finances for twenty years. Every coin in, every coin out, cross-referenced and filed. Most people think it's eccentric. But when discrepancies surface, that clerk's records are the only thing standing between the truth and whoever wants to bury it. If you ever need to prove someone's been skimming, that's the person to see.
